name: Rolled-Oat Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter and brown sugar in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Add the egg yolks to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Sift together the rolled oats, baking powder, vanilla, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients into the wet mixture, stirring gently until just combined.
5. In a separate clean bowl, beat the egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg white mixture into the batter using a spatula or whisk, ensuring not to deflate the meringue.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a nonstick baking sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes, or until lightly golden and crisp around the edges.
9. Allow the macaroons to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
